permissions.name: android.permission.READ_CONTACTS
permissions.description: Allows an application to read all of the contact (address) data stored on your phone. Malicious applications can use this to send your data to other people.

permissions.name: android.permission.WRITE_CONTACTS
permissions.description: Allows an application to modify the contact (address) data stored on your phone. Malicious applications can use this to erase or modify your contact data.

permissions.name: com.google.android.launcher.permission.WRITE_SETTINGS
permissions.description: Allows an application to modify the system's settings data. Malicious applications can corrupt your system's configuration.

permissions.name: android.permission.USE_CREDENTIALS
permissions.description: Allows an application to request authentication tokens.

permissions.name: android.permission.MANAGE_ACCOUNTS
permissions.description: Allows an application to perform operations like adding and removing accounts and deleting their password.

permissions.name: android.permission.WRITE_SETTINGS
permissions.description: Allows an application to modify the system's settings data. Malicious applications can corrupt your system's configuration.

permissions.name: android.permission.READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE
permissions.description: Allows an application to read from external storage.

permissions.name: android.permission.READ_MEDIA_VISUAL_USER_SELECTED
permissions.description: Allows an application to read image or video files from external storage that a user has selected via the permission prompt photo picker. Apps can check this permission to verify that a user has decided to use the photo picker, instead of granting access to READ_MEDIA_IMAGES or READ_MEDIA_VIDEO . It does not prevent apps from accessing the standard photo picker manually. This permission should be requested alongside READ_MEDIA_IMAGES and/or READ_MEDIA_VIDEO , depending on which type of media is desired.

permissions.name: android.permission.READ_MEDIA_IMAGES
permissions.description: Allows an application to read image files from external storage.

permissions.name: android.permission.READ_MEDIA_VIDEO
permissions.description: Allows an application to read video files from external storage.

permissions.name: com.google.android.gms.permission.ACTIVITY_RECOGNITION
permissions.description: Allows an application to recognize physical activity.

permissions.name: android.permission.READ_PROFILE
permissions.description: Allows an application to read the user's personal profile data.

permissions.name: android.permission.ACCESS_COARSE_LOCATION
permissions.description: Access coarse location sources, such as the mobile network database, to determine an approximate phone location, where available. Malicious applications can use this to determine approximately where you are.

permissions.name: android.permission.ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION
permissions.description: Access fine location sources, such as the Global Positioning System on the phone, where available. Malicious applications can use this to determine where you are and may consume additional battery power.

permissions.name: android.permission.ACCESS_BACKGROUND_LOCATION
permissions.description: Allows an app to access location in the background.

permissions.name: android.permission.CALL_PHONE
permissions.description: Allows the application to call phone numbers without your intervention. Malicious applications may cause unexpected calls on your phone bill. Note that this does not allow the application to call emergency numbers.

permissions.name: android.permission.NEARBY_WIFI_DEVICES
permissions.description: Required to be able to advertise and connect to nearby devices via Wi-Fi.

permissions.name: android.permission.READ_CALENDAR
permissions.description: Allows an application to read all of the calendar events stored on your phone. Malicious applications can use this to send your calendar events to other people.

permissions.name: android.permission.READ_CALL_LOG
permissions.description: Allows an application to read the user's call log.

permissions.name: android.permission.READ_SMS
permissions.description: Allows application to read SMS messages stored on your phone or SIM card. Malicious applications may read your confidential messages.

permissions.name: android.permission.READ_PHONE_STATE
permissions.description: Allows the application to access the phone features of the device. An application with this permission can determine the phone number and serial number of this phone, whether a call is active, the number that call is connected to and so on.

permissions.name: android.permission.RECORD_AUDIO
permissions.description: Allows application to access the audio record path.

permissions.name: android.permission.SEND_SMS
permissions.description: Allows application to send SMS messages. Malicious applications may cost you money by sending messages without your confirmation.

permissions.name: android.permission.GET_TASKS
permissions.description: Allows application to retrieve information about currently and recently running tasks. May allow malicious applications to discover private information about other applications.

permissions.name: android.permission.WRITE_CALENDAR
permissions.description: Allows an application to add or change the events on your calendar, which may send emails to guests. Malicious applications can use this to erase or modify your calendar events or to send emails to guests.

permissions.name: android.permission.WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE
permissions.description: Allows an application to write to external storage.

permissions.name: android.permission.WRITE_SMS
permissions.description: Allows application to write to SMS messages stored on your phone or SIM card. Malicious applications may delete your messages.

permissions.name: android.permission.CAMERA
permissions.description: Allows application to take pictures and videos with the camera. This allows the application to collect images that the camera is seeing at any time.

permissions.name: android.permission.SYSTEM_ALERT_WINDOW
permissions.description: Allows an application to show system-alert windows. Malicious applications can take over the entire screen of the phone.

permissions.name: android.permission.ANSWER_PHONE_CALLS
permissions.description: Allows the app to answer an incoming phone call.

permissions.name: android.permission.WRITE_APN_SETTINGS
permissions.description: Allows an application to modify the APN settings, such as Proxy and Port of any APN.

permissions.name: android.permission.BLUETOOTH_CONNECT
permissions.description: Required to be able to connect to paired Bluetooth devices.

permissions.name: android.permission.BLUETOOTH_SCAN
permissions.description: Required to be able to discover and pair nearby Bluetooth devices.

permissions.name: android.permission.POST_NOTIFICATIONS
permissions.description: Allows an app to post notifications

store_info.title: Google
store_info.description: Find what you need with Google

vulnerabilities.description: Base config is insecurely configured to permit clear text traffic to all domains.
Base config is configured to trust system certificates.
Domain config is insecurely configured to permit clear text traffic to these domains in scope.
